overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through neon-lit urban alleyways at night. The player navigates from narrow outdoor passages through a plaza area, then descends into dark industrial tunnels with glowing green lights, finally emerging into a narrow graffiti-covered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban alley with fire escapes and billboards

events.description: two NPC pedestrians initially block path, then camera passes them
exiting narrow alley into wider urban plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow alleyway, passing pedestrians and moving toward open plaza

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians standing in alley, one holding umbrella and wearing yellow top

entered.detail: metal staircase structure with railings attached to brick building
large illuminated corporate advertisement on building wall with text
wooden shelf unit with cardboard boxes and discarded items
red brick wall with metal fixtures and pipes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cyberpunk alley at night, with a metal fire escape on the left and a large illuminated billboard on the right. Two NPCs stand in the path initially. The camera moves forward through the wet asphalt alley, passing wooden shelves and debris, approaching a wider plaza area visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with parked vehicles and vending machines

events.description: turning right into plaza area with parked vehicles
approaching building entrance with illuminated vending machines

agents.ego_description: navigating through urban plaza, turning past parked vehicles and approaching building entrance with vending machines

entered.detail: several cars parked along the building facade
brightly lit red and green vending machines near building entrance
tall building with illuminated windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider urban plaza with parked vehicles visible on the right. The camera turns through the space, moving toward a building entrance flanked by brightly lit vending machines. The environment transitions from the narrow alley to a more open commercial area with multi-story buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark industrial tunnel with glowing green safety lights

events.description: entering dark tunnel from lit exterior, visibility drops significantly
ascending concrete stairs inside tunnel structure

agents.ego_description: entering dark industrial tunnel, walking past glowing green cylindrical lights and ascending stairs

entered.detail: cylindrical posts with horizontal glowing green rings providing dim illumination
metal and concrete staircase with yellow railings
large yellow and red pipes running along tunnel walls
metal benches along the tunnel walls with debris

segments.scene_description: The segment transitions into a dark, enclosed industrial tunnel with minimal lighting provided by glowing green cylindrical bollards. The camera moves through the concrete corridor, ascending stairs and passing metal benches and industrial pipes. The atmosphere is dim and atmospheric compared to the neon-lit exterior.

events.description: exiting dark tunnel into narrower corridor with wooden walls and graffiti
approaching brighter exit at end of graffiti corridor

agents.ego_description: moving through narrow corridor with graffiti-covered walls, approaching lit exit at the end

entered.detail: large mural depicting a figure with text LA FAMILIA on wooden wall
walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art tags
closed metal security shutters with graffiti art

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a narrow corridor with wooden walls covered in graffiti and street art, including a prominent LA FAMILIA mural. The camera progresses toward a brighter exit visible at the end of the passage, transitioning from the dark industrial tunnel to this more artistically decorated narrow walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit urban alleyway through a commercial plaza and into the dim depths of an industrial complex. It begins by moving through a narrow, wet asphalt alley past a metal fire escape and a glowing billboard, pushing forward past debris toward a distant opening. As the space expands, the camera enters a wider urban plaza with parked vehicles and brightly lit vending machines before turning toward a building entrance. The scene then shifts abruptly into a dark, enclosed industrial tunnel, where the vibrant neon is replaced by dim green cylindrical bollards and concrete stairs lined with pipes. Finally, the camera progresses from the industrial gloom into a narrow walkway defined by wooden walls covered in graffiti and a prominent LA FAMILIA mural, moving steadily toward a bright exit.
